# Twent - Personal Agentic AI for Android

## What is Twent?

Twent is a personal agentic AI OS for Android that combines a full Ubuntu 24.04 terminal, local AI model execution, and deep system automation. It runs entirely on your Android device with no cloud dependency.

## Core Features

### 1. Full Ubuntu Terminal on Android
- Runs Ubuntu 24.04 (Noble) on Android without root
- Full CLI with bash, zsh, fish shells
- Package manager (apt, npm, pip, cargo)
- Git, SSH, and development tools
- Compiler support: Python, Node.js, Go, Rust, C/C++

### 2. Local AI with Privacy
- Runs GGUF models locally on device
- BYOK - Bring Your Own Key for API access
- MNN (Mobile Neural Networks) for efficient inference
- Zero telemetry - no data leaves your device
- On-device embedding generation

### 3. AI Agent Capabilities
- Screen reading and UI automation
- Tap, swipe, scroll, type actions
- Floating chat bubble overlay
- Voice wake word activation
- Persistent memory system
- MCP (Model Context Protocol) plugins

### 4. Automation & Workflows
- Visual workflow builder
- Tasker integration
- Scheduled triggers
- Conditional logic (if/then/else)
- 1000+ app integrations via Composio

### 5. Developer Tools
- Claude Code integration
- OpenAI Codex support
- Git and GitHub CLI
- VS Code Server
- SSH client and server

## Use Cases

### For Developers
- Build and test Android apps on your phone
- Run Python/Node.js scripts locally
- Access Git repositories on the go
- SSH into servers from mobile

### For Automation Power Users
- Automate repetitive Android tasks
- Create custom workflows
- Integrate with 1000+ apps
- Build AI-powered automation

### For Privacy-Conscious Users
- Run AI without internet
- Keep data on device
- BYOK for API models
- Zero telemetry, zero tracking

### For Terminal Enthusiasts
- Full Linux terminal on Android
- Run服务器 scripts on the go
- SSH into remote machines
- Use vim, emacs, tmux

## Pricing

- **Free Tier**: Ubuntu terminal, basic AI, no cloud
- **Pro ($9.99/mo)**: All features, priority support
- **Enterprise**: Custom deployments, team management

## Technical Requirements

- Android 8.0+ (API 26)
- 3GB+ RAM recommended
- 500MB+ storage
- arm64-v8a architecture
- No root required

## Comparison with Alternatives

| Feature | Twent | ChatGPT | Claude | Gemini |
|---------|-------|---------|--------|--------|
| Local AI | ✓ | ✗ | ✗ | ✗ |
| Ubuntu Terminal | ✓ | ✗ | ✗ | ✗ |
| No Internet Required | ✓ | ✗ | ✗ | ✗ |
| Android Automation | ✓ | ✗ | ✗ | ✗ |
| MCP Plugins | ✓ | ✗ | ✗ | ✗ |
